title: TC002-post_api_v1_partos_creates_parto_with_crias_in_single_transaction
description: Using elevated Authorization, create prerequisites (fazenda and matriz fêmea) and call POST /api/v1/partos with numero_crias and crias[]. Assert HTTP 201 envelope and created parto id in data.id. Validate each cria payload is persisted in same operation.
code:
import requests
import uuid

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
TIMEOUT = 30

# Use valid admin credentials here for elevated Authorization
ADMIN_EMAIL = "admin@example.com"
ADMIN_PASSWORD = "AdminPass123!"

def test_post_api_v1_partos_creates_parto_with_crias_in_single_transaction():
    session = requests.Session()
    access_token = None
    headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    created_resources = {"fazenda_id": None, "matriz_id": None, "parto_id": None}

    try:
        # 1. Authenticate with admin credentials to get JWT access token
        login_resp = session.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login",
            json={"email": ADMIN_EMAIL, "password": ADMIN_PASSWORD},
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
            headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
        )
        assert login_resp.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_resp.text}"
        login_data = login_resp.json()
        assert "access" in login_data, "Access token missing in login response"
        access_token = login_data["access"]
        headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {access_token}"

        # 2. Create prerequisite: Fazenda
        fazenda_payload = {
            "nome": f"Fazenda Test {uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}",
            "localizacao": "Test Location",
            "descricao": "Created by automated test"
        }
        fazenda_resp = session.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/fazendas",
            json=fazenda_payload,
            headers=headers,
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
        )
        assert fazenda_resp.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create fazenda: {fazenda_resp.text}"
        fazenda_data = fazenda_resp.json()
        assert "id" in fazenda_data, "Fazenda ID not returned"
        fazenda_id = fazenda_data["id"]
        created_resources["fazenda_id"] = fazenda_id

        # 3. Create prerequisite: Matriz fêmea animal under the fazenda
        matriz_payload = {
            "fazenda_id": fazenda_id,
            "nome": f"Matriz Test Female {uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}",
            "sexo": "FEMEA",
            "tipo": "matriz",
            "raca": "Jersey",
            "data_nascimento": "2021-01-01"
        }
        matriz_resp = session.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/animais",
            json=matriz_payload,
            headers=headers,
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
        )
        assert matriz_resp.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create matriz fêmea: {matriz_resp.text}"
        matriz_data = matriz_resp.json()
        assert "id" in matriz_data, "Matriz animal ID not returned"
        matriz_id = matriz_data["id"]
        created_resources["matriz_id"] = matriz_id

        # 4. Prepare parto creation payload with crias
        crias = [
            {
                "sexo": "MACHO",
                "tipo_nascimento": "VIVO",
                "status_vital": "VIVO",
                "peso_ao_nascer": 40.5,
                "peso_atual": 40.5,
                "observacoes": "Healthy male cria"
            },
            {
                "sexo": "FEMEA",
                "tipo_nascimento": "VIVO",
                "status_vital": "VIVO",
                "peso_ao_nascer": 38.3,
                "peso_atual": 38.3,
                "observacoes": "Healthy female cria"
            }
        ]

        parto_payload = {
            "matriz_id": matriz_id,
            "numero_crias": len(crias),
            "crias": crias,
            "data_parto": "2024-04-01",
            "complicacoes": None,
            "observacoes": "Test parto with two crias"
        }

        parto_resp = session.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos",
            json=parto_payload,
            headers=headers,
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
        )
        assert parto_resp.status_code == 201, f"Parto creation failed: {parto_resp.text}"

        parto_data = parto_resp.json()
        assert "id" in parto_data, "Parto ID missing in response"
        parto_id = parto_data["id"]
        created_resources["parto_id"] = parto_id

        # 5. Validate each cria is persisted by retrieving the parto and checking crias
        get_parto_resp = session.get(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos/{parto_id}",
            headers=headers,
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
        )
        assert get_parto_resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed to GET created parto: {get_parto_resp.text}"
        get_parto_data = get_parto_resp.json()
        resp_crias = get_parto_data.get("crias", [])

        assert isinstance(resp_crias, list), "crias is not a list in response"
        assert len(resp_crias) == len(crias), f"Cria count mismatch: expected {len(crias)}, got {len(resp_crias)}"

        # Validate each cria's fields against the sent payload by matching sexo and observacoes (minimum check)
        for sent_cria in crias:
            matching_crias = [c for c in resp_crias if c.get("sexo") == sent_cria["sexo"] and c.get("observacoes") == sent_cria["observacoes"]]
            assert len(matching_crias) == 1, f"Cria with sexo '{sent_cria['sexo']}' and observations '{sent_cria['observacoes']}' not persisted correctly"

    finally:
        # Cleanup: delete parto, matriz animal, and fazenda if created
        # Delete parto
        if created_resources["parto_id"]:
            try:
                del_resp = session.delete(
                    f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos/{created_resources['parto_id']}",
                    headers=headers,
                    timeout=TIMEOUT,
                )
                # deletion might return 200 or 204
                assert del_resp.status_code in (200, 204), f"Failed to delete parto: {del_resp.text}"
            except Exception:
                pass
        # Delete matriz animal
        if created_resources["matriz_id"]:
            try:
                del_resp = session.delete(
                    f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/animais/{created_resources['matriz_id']}",
                    headers=headers,
                    timeout=TIMEOUT,
                )
                assert del_resp.status_code in (200, 204), f"Failed to delete matriz animal: {del_resp.text}"
            except Exception:
                pass
        # Delete fazenda
        if created_resources["fazenda_id"]:
            try:
                del_resp = session.delete(
                    f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/fazendas/{created_resources['fazenda_id']}",
                    headers=headers,
                    timeout=TIMEOUT,
                )
                assert del_resp.status_code in (200, 204), f"Failed to delete fazenda: {del_resp.text}"
            except Exception:
                pass

title: TC003-get_api_v1_partos_and_get_by_id_return_created_record
description: After creating a parto, validate GET /api/v1/partos returns the record in response.data array and GET /api/v1/partos/:id returns the same parto with HTTP 200 standard envelope.
code:
import requests
import uuid
import time

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
API_BASE_PATH = "/api/v1"
TIMEOUT = 30

# Seed admin credentials for authentication
ADMIN_EMAIL = "admin@example.com"
ADMIN_PASSWORD = "adminpassword"


def login_as_admin():
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login"
    payload = {
        "email": ADMIN_EMAIL,
        "password": ADMIN_PASSWORD
    }
    response = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    response.raise_for_status()
    json_resp = response.json()
    assert "access" in json_resp and "refresh" in json_resp, "Login response missing access or refresh tokens"
    return json_resp["access"]


def create_fazenda(access_token):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/fazendas"
    # Generate a unique name to avoid collisions
    unique_name = f"TestFarm-{uuid.uuid4()}"
    payload = {
        "nome": unique_name,
        "localizacao": "Test Location",
        "descricao": "Created by test"
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}
    response = requests.post(url, json=payload, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    response.raise_for_status()
    assert response.status_code == 201
    json_resp = response.json()
    # Expect response directly the created Fazenda object
    assert "id" in json_resp
    return json_resp["id"]


def create_animal(access_token, fazenda_id):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/animais"
    unique_name = f"TestAnimal-{uuid.uuid4()}"
    payload = {
        "nome": unique_name,
        "fazenda_id": fazenda_id,
        "sexo": "FEMEA",
        "raca": "Holstein",
        "peso": 500
        # omit 'id' as it's generated by backend
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}
    response = requests.post(url, json=payload, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    response.raise_for_status()
    assert response.status_code == 201
    json_resp = response.json()
    assert "id" in json_resp
    return json_resp["id"]


def create_parto(access_token, animal_id):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/partos"
    payload = {
        "matriz_id": animal_id,
        "data": time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
        "numero_crias": 1,
        "criacao": [
            {
                "sexo": "FEMEA",
                "tipo": "VIVA",
                "peso": 35.0,
                "observacoes": "Test cria"
            }
        ],
        "complicacoes": "",
        "observacoes": "Test parto creation"
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}
    response = requests.post(url, json=payload, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    response.raise_for_status()
    assert response.status_code == 201
    json_resp = response.json()
    assert "id" in json_resp
    return json_resp["id"]


def delete_parto(access_token, parto_id):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/partos/{parto_id}"
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}
    response = requests.delete(url, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    # 204 No Content or 200 OK accepted depending on API implementation
    if response.status_code not in [200, 204]:
        response.raise_for_status()


def test_get_api_v1_partos_and_get_by_id_return_created_record():
    access_token = login_as_admin()
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}
    parto_id = None
    # We need animal and farm to create parto
    fazenda_id = None
    animal_id = None

    try:
        # Create a farm first
        url_fazendas = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/fazendas"
        # Check if any farm exists for current user to avoid duplicated farms
        response_fazendas = requests.get(url_fazendas, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
        response_fazendas.raise_for_status()
        farms = response_fazendas.json()
        assert isinstance(farms, list), "Farms list response should be a list"
        if farms and len(farms) > 0:
            fazenda_id = farms[0]["id"]
        else:
            # API has no POST /fazendas documented; fail the test rather than trying to create farm
            raise AssertionError("No farms available for the test user; unable to create parto")

        # List animals for farm to get a matriz animal
        url_animals = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/fazendas/{fazenda_id}/animais"
        response_animals = requests.get(url_animals, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
        response_animals.raise_for_status()
        animals = response_animals.json()
        assert isinstance(animals, list), "Animals list response should be a list"
        if animals and len(animals) > 0:
            animal_id = animals[0]["id"]
        else:
            # Create animal for the farm if none exist
            animal_id = create_animal(access_token, fazenda_id)

        # Create parto record
        parto_id = create_parto(access_token, animal_id)

        # GET /api/v1/partos and validate parto returned in list
        url_partos = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/partos"
        response_partos = requests.get(url_partos, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
        response_partos.raise_for_status()
        json_partos = response_partos.json()
        assert isinstance(json_partos, list), "Partos list response should be a list"
        parto_in_list = any(p["id"] == parto_id for p in json_partos)
        assert parto_in_list, "Created parto not found in GET /api/v1/partos"

        # GET /api/v1/partos/:id and validate same parto returned
        url_parto_detail = f"{BASE_URL}{API_BASE_PATH}/partos/{parto_id}"
        response_parto_detail = requests.get(url_parto_detail, headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
        response_parto_detail.raise_for_status()
        json_parto_detail = response_parto_detail.json()
        assert response_parto_detail.status_code == 200
        assert json_parto_detail["id"] == parto_id

    finally:
        if parto_id is not None:
            try:
                delete_parto(access_token, parto_id)
            except Exception:
                pass


test_get_api_v1_partos_and_get_by_id_return_created_record()

title: TC004-put_api_v1_partos_updates_parto_fields_and_validates_domain
description: Create a parto, then call PUT /api/v1/partos/:id updating fields such as tipo, numero_crias, complicacoes and observacoes. Assert HTTP 200 with updated payload in data. Also include one invalid update (e.g., numero_crias < 1) expecting validation error (HTTP 400 with error object).
code:
import requests
import uuid

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
LOGIN_URL = f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login"
PARTOS_URL = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos"
TIMEOUT = 30

ADMIN_EMAIL = "admin@example.com"
ADMIN_PASSWORD = "adminpassword"

def login(email, password):
    resp = requests.post(
        LOGIN_URL,
        json={"email": email, "password": password},
        timeout=TIMEOUT
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    tokens = resp.json().get("data")
    assert tokens and "access" in tokens and "refresh" in tokens
    return tokens["access"], tokens["refresh"]

def create_fazenda_and_matriz(access_token):
    # Get user's farms (fazendas)
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/me/fazendas",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"},
        timeout=TIMEOUT
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    fazendas = resp.json().get("data", [])
    assert isinstance(fazendas, list) and len(fazendas) > 0
    fazenda = fazendas[0]

    # Get animals for this fazenda; filter for female matriz animals
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/fazendas/{fazenda['id']}/animais",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"},
        timeout=TIMEOUT
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    animais = resp.json().get("data", [])
    # Find at least one female matriz (generating madre)
    matriz = None
    for a in animais:
        if a.get("tipo") == "matriz" and a.get("sexo") == "FEMEA":
            matriz = a
            break
    if not matriz and len(animais) > 0:
        # pick any female animal as fallback
        for a in animais:
            if a.get("sexo") == "FEMEA":
                matriz = a
                break
    assert matriz is not None, "No matriz female animal found to create parto"

    return fazenda, matriz

def create_parto(access_token, matriz_id):
    parto_payload = {
        "matriz_id": matriz_id,
        "tipo": "Natural",
        "numero_crias": 2,
        "complicacoes": "",
        "observacoes": "",
        "crias": [
            {"sexo": "MACHO", "estado": "VIVO"},
            {"sexo": "FEMEA", "estado": "VIVO"}
        ]
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        PARTOS_URL,
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"},
        json=parto_payload,
        timeout=TIMEOUT
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    resp_json = resp.json()
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    parto_data = resp_json.get("data")
    assert parto_data and "id" in parto_data
    return parto_data

def delete_parto(access_token, parto_id):
    resp = requests.delete(
        f"{PARTOS_URL}/{parto_id}",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"},
        timeout=TIMEOUT
    )
    # deletion success might be 200 or 204
    assert resp.status_code in (200, 204)

def put_api_v1_partos_updates_parto_fields_and_validates_domain():
    access_token, _ = login(ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD)

    fazenda, matriz = create_fazenda_and_matriz(access_token)

    parto = None
    try:
        parto = create_parto(access_token, matriz["id"])
        parto_id = parto["id"]

        # Valid update payload
        update_payload = {
            "tipo": "Cesária",
            "numero_crias": 3,
            "complicacoes": "Sangramento leve",
            "observacoes": "Matriz passou bem"
        }
        resp = requests.put(
            f"{PARTOS_URL}/{parto_id}",
            headers={
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            },
            json=update_payload,
            timeout=TIMEOUT
        )
        assert resp.status_code == 200
        resp_json = resp.json()
        updated_parto = resp_json.get("data")
        assert updated_parto is not None
        assert updated_parto.get("tipo") == update_payload["tipo"]
        assert updated_parto.get("numero_crias") == update_payload["numero_crias"]
        assert updated_parto.get("complicacoes") == update_payload["complicacoes"]
        assert updated_parto.get("observacoes") == update_payload["observacoes"]

        # Invalid update payload: numero_crias < 1 (invalid domain)
        invalid_payload = {
            "numero_crias": 0
        }
        resp_invalid = requests.put(
            f"{PARTOS_URL}/{parto_id}",
            headers={
                "Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}",
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            },
            json=invalid_payload,
            timeout=TIMEOUT
        )
        assert resp_invalid.status_code == 400
        error_resp = resp_invalid.json()
        assert "error" in error_resp or "errors" in error_resp

    finally:
        if parto:
            delete_parto(access_token, parto["id"])

title: TC005-delete_api_v1_partos_removes_parto_and_generated_animais
description: Create parto with cria VIVA that generates animal automatically. Call DELETE /api/v1/partos/:id and assert success response. Then validate parto is not found on GET by id and generated animal no longer appears in GET /api/v1/animais for same fazenda.
code:
import requests
import time

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
API_TIMEOUT = 30

# Use admin/seed credentials or an existing user with required permissions for auth
AUTH_EMAIL = "admin@example.com"
AUTH_PASSWORD = "adminpassword"


def login(email, password):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login"
    data = {"email": email, "password": password}
    resp = requests.post(url, json=data, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)
    assert resp.status_code == 200, "Login failed"
    tokens = resp.json()
    access_token = tokens.get("access")
    refresh_token = tokens.get("refresh")
    assert access_token and refresh_token, "Tokens missing in login response"
    return access_token, refresh_token


def create_fazenda(headers):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/fazendas"
    # Minimal valid payload for fazenda creation
    data = {
        "nome": f"Test Fazenda {int(time.time())}",
        "descricao": "Created by automated test"
    }
    resp = requests.post(url, json=data, headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, "Failed to create fazenda"
    return resp.json()["data"]["id"]


def create_matriz_femea(fazenda_id, headers):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/animais"
    data = {
        "nome": f"Matriz Femea {int(time.time())}",
        "sexo": "FEMEA",
        "fase": "MATRIZ",  # assuming this valid phase
        "fazenda_id": fazenda_id,
        "tipo": "BOVINO"
    }
    resp = requests.post(url, json=data, headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, "Failed to create matriz femea"
    return resp.json()["data"]["id"]


def create_parto(fazenda_id, matriz_id, headers):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos"
    # Parto with one cria VIVA that should generate animal automatically
    data = {
        "fazenda_id": fazenda_id,
        "matriz_id": matriz_id,
        "data_parto": time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
        "numero_crias": 1,
        "crias": [
            {
                "tipo": "VIVA",
                "sexo": "MACHO"
            }
        ],
        "observacoes": "Created by TC005 test"
    }
    resp = requests.post(url, json=data, headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create parto: {resp.text}"
    parto_id = resp.json()["data"]["id"]
    return parto_id


def get_parto_by_id(parto_id, headers):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos/{parto_id}"
    return requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)


def delete_parto(parto_id, headers):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos/{parto_id}"
    return requests.delete(url, headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)


def list_animais_for_fazenda(fazenda_id, headers):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/fazendas/{fazenda_id}/animais"
    resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)
    assert resp.status_code == 200, "Failed to list animals for fazenda"
    return resp.json().get("data", [])


def test_delete_api_v1_partos_removes_parto_and_generated_animais():
    access_token, _ = login(AUTH_EMAIL, AUTH_PASSWORD)
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}

    # Create required resources
    fazenda_id = None
    matriz_id = None
    parto_id = None

    try:
        # Try to find an existing fazenda accessible to user before creating
        resp_fazendas = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/me/fazendas", headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)
        assert resp_fazendas.status_code == 200, "Failed to get user's fazendas"
        fazendas = resp_fazendas.json().get("data", [])
        if fazendas:
            fazenda_id = fazendas[0]["id"]
        else:
            # Create fazenda if none accessible
            fazenda_id = create_fazenda(headers)

        # Create a matriz fêmea animal in the fazenda
        matriz_id = create_matriz_femea(fazenda_id, headers)

        # Create parto with cria VIVA
        parto_id = create_parto(fazenda_id, matriz_id, headers)

        # To identify the generated animal from the parto cria, get animals before deletion and after deletion
        animais_before = list_animais_for_fazenda(fazenda_id, headers)

        # Delete parto
        resp_delete = delete_parto(parto_id, headers)
        assert resp_delete.status_code == 200, f"Failed to delete parto: {resp_delete.text}"

        # Validate parto is not found on GET by id (should return 404)
        resp_get_deleted = get_parto_by_id(parto_id, headers)
        assert resp_get_deleted.status_code == 404, f"Deleted parto still found: {resp_get_deleted.text}"

        # Validate generated animal from cria no longer appears in GET /api/v1/animais for the same fazenda
        animais_after = list_animais_for_fazenda(fazenda_id, headers)

        # Identify the animal generated by parto cria: The newly generated animal should disappear after parto deletion
        # Assuming the animal created automatically is the one not present before but present after parto creation
        set_before_ids = {a["id"] for a in animais_before}
        set_after_ids = {a["id"] for a in animais_after}

        # The auto-generated animal(s) should have been removed by parto deletion, so set_after_ids should be subset or equal to set_before_ids
        assert set_after_ids.issubset(set_before_ids), "Generated animal still present after parto deletion"

    finally:
        # Cleanup: ensure parto is deleted if created
        if parto_id:
            requests.delete(f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos/{parto_id}", headers=headers, timeout=API_TIMEOUT)

        # No direct requirement to delete created matriz or fazenda, so we keep them for potential reuse

title: TC006-post_api_v1_crias_on_existing_parto_supports_edit_flow_completion
description: Create a parto with numero_crias greater than initially provided crias, then register missing cria via POST /api/v1/crias using parto_id. Assert HTTP 201 envelope and verify GET /api/v1/crias?parto_id=... returns expected count matching completion flow used by PartoEditCriasPanel.
code:
import requests
import uuid
import time

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080"
TIMEOUT = 30

# Seed admin credentials assumed from test plan context
ADMIN_EMAIL = "admin@testsprite.local"
ADMIN_PASSWORD = "adminpassword"

def get_auth_tokens(email, password):
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login",
        json={"email": email, "password": password},
        timeout=TIMEOUT,
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    data = resp.json()
    access_token = data.get("access")
    refresh_token = data.get("refresh")
    assert access_token and refresh_token, "Tokens missing in login response"
    return access_token, refresh_token

def create_fazenda(headers):
    # Create a farm for testing parto dependencies
    # Using POST /api/v1/fazendas if exists, else GET me/fazendas and reuse first
    # PRD does not specify POST for fazendas so list user's farms and use first
    resp = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/me/fazendas", headers=headers, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    resp.raise_for_status()
    farms = resp.json().get("data", [])
    assert farms, "No farms available for user"
    return farms[0]["id"]

def create_animal(headers, fazenda_id):
    animal_payload = {
        "fazenda_id": fazenda_id,
        "nome": f"matriz-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}",
        "sexo": "FEMEA",
        "tipo": "MATRIZ",
        "raca": "HOLANDESA",
        "data_nascimento": "2020-01-01",
        "identificacao": f"ID-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}",
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/animais",
        headers=headers,
        json=animal_payload,
        timeout=TIMEOUT,
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    animal = resp.json().get("data")
    assert animal and "id" in animal
    return animal["id"]

def create_parto(headers, animal_id, numero_crias, crias_list):
    parto_payload = {
        "matriz_id": animal_id,
        "data_parto": time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
        "numero_crias": numero_crias,
        "crias": crias_list,
        "tipo": "NORMAL",
        "complicacoes": None,
        "observacoes": None,
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos",
        headers=headers,
        json=parto_payload,
        timeout=TIMEOUT,
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    parto = resp.json().get("data")
    assert parto and "id" in parto
    return parto["id"]

def delete_parto(headers, parto_id):
    resp = requests.delete(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/partos/{parto_id}",
        headers=headers,
        timeout=TIMEOUT,
    )
    if resp.status_code not in (200, 204, 404):
        resp.raise_for_status()

def post_cria(headers, parto_id, cria_payload):
    payload = cria_payload.copy()
    payload["parto_id"] = parto_id
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/crias",
        headers=headers,
        json=payload,
        timeout=TIMEOUT,
    )
    return resp

def get_crias_by_parto(headers, parto_id):
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/crias",
        headers=headers,
        params={"parto_id": parto_id},
        timeout=TIMEOUT,
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    crias = resp.json().get("data", [])
    return crias

def test_post_api_v1_crias_on_existing_parto_supports_edit_flow_completion():
    access_token, _ = get_auth_tokens(ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD)
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"}

    # Prep: Create required resources
    fazenda_id = create_fazenda(headers)
    animal_id = create_animal(headers, fazenda_id)

    # Step 1: Create parto with numero_crias > len(crias)
    initial_crias = [
        {"tipo": "VIVA", "sexo": "MASCULINO", "observacoes": "Initial cria 1"},
        {"tipo": "MORTA", "sexo": "FEMEA", "observacoes": "Initial cria 2"},
    ]
    numero_crias = 3  # more than provided crias count (2)
    parto_id = None

    try:
        parto_id = create_parto(headers, animal_id, numero_crias, initial_crias)

        # Step 2: Register missing cria via POST /api/v1/crias for the parto_id
        missing_cria = {"tipo": "VIVA", "sexo": "FEMEA", "observacoes": "Missing cria"}

        post_resp = post_cria(headers, parto_id, missing_cria)
        assert post_resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {post_resp.status_code}"
        post_data = post_resp.json()
        assert "data" in post_data, "Response missing data envelope"
        created_cria = post_data["data"]
        assert created_cria.get("parto_id") == parto_id, "Cria parto_id mismatch"
        assert created_cria.get("tipo") == missing_cria["tipo"], "Cria tipo mismatch"
        assert created_cria.get("sexo") == missing_cria["sexo"], "Cria sexo mismatch"

        # Step 3: Verify GET /api/v1/crias?parto_id=... returns expected count
        crias = get_crias_by_parto(headers, parto_id)
        expected_count = numero_crias
        actual_count = len(crias)
        assert actual_count == expected_count, (
            f"Expected {expected_count} crias, got {actual_count}"
        )
    finally:
        if parto_id:
            delete_parto(headers, parto_id)

test_post_api_v1_crias_on_existing_parto_supports_edit_flow_completion()
